text:
Hello :-)

Thanks for the new patch and commit!
There's a small typo, it should be "PORTREVISION=" instead of "POTREVISION=" (the "R" is missing).

I still haven't found the time to try the patch on www/squid-devel. I hope soon.

Best Regards,
Olivier
